note: [Step 6.5-19] Materializes the plan only -- no Ollama collection, feature extraction, or LightGAE training happens in Step 6.5. attack_assignment_version stays provisional until budget_manipulation/unauthorized_artifact_forwarding are independently validated (see attack_applicability_plan.json).
attack_assignment_note: attack_repeats_per_task x 50 assumes ONE representative attack per task_instance, not every family x every task (Step 6.5-2/6.5-14) -- exact per-family task counts are set once attack_applicability_plan.json's provisional candidates are finalized.
temperature: ollama_default (not explicitly overridden by OllamaAgentExecutor -- see experiments/real_llm/travel_a2a/ollama_executor.py)
seed_policy: DeterministicIdFactory for object IDs; per-pair order_seed for normal/attack execution-order randomization (Step 6.4/6-4), reproducible per (order_seed, pair_id)
execution_order_policy: randomized per pair via random.Random(f'{order_seed}:{pair_id}').choice(['normal_first','attack_first']) -- never hardcoded normal-first (Step 6-4, matched_pair_runner.py)
warmup_policy: not yet defined -- to be set before Phase formal collection begins (out of scope for Step 6.5)
collector_version: mini_validation_runner.py-equivalent for formal_workload, not yet implemented as of Step 6.5A
